General.Name: Golden Solar New Energy Technology Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Golden Solar New Energy Technology Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells footwear products in the People's Republic of China, the United States, South America, Europe, South East Asia, and internationally. It operates through Boree Branded Products, Graphene-based Products, Photovoltaic Products, and Original Equipment Manufacturer segments. The company offers slippers, sandals, and casual footwear under the Boree brand name. It also manufactures and sells graphene-based ethylene-vinyl acetate foam material and slippers, deodorizing and sterilizing chips for air purifiers and air conditioners, and graphene air sterilizers. In addition, the company produces slippers for branding and resale by others; and trades in slippers. Further, the company manufactures and sells cast monocrystalline silicon wafers and cast-mono heterojunction solar cells and modules, hybrid passivation back contact solar cells, HBC flexible modules and the bendable solar awnings. Golden Solar New Energy Technology Holdings Limited was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Quanzhou, the People's Republic of China.
